description: MergeCell merge algebra (#relaycell, Phase 1). A binding creates a MergeCell under each policy, replays the `merge` ops, and asserts (a) the converged value after each op and (b) whether the op changed state — `invalidates` false means ⊕(old,op) == old, so the ==-guard suppresses the cascade (free dedup for an idempotent ⊕, and the identity element for any policy). KeepLatest is the band behind a plain Cell (Cell ≡ MergeCell<KeepLatest>); Sum is a commutative monoid (not idempotent); Max is a semilattice (idempotent — merging at/below the current max is a no-op). Associativity and the commutativity/idempotency flags per policy are pinned separately by each binding's property-based law-tests.
